title: Hookshot - From Zelda
description: The Hookshot from the mod - Zelda, Legend of the Master Sword
body:
# __**Hookshot**__  
  
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1197917238091579572?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&link=https://discord.gg/F3YxQBRX3P)](https://discord.gg/Kb9SmGCxBv)
=======================================================================================================================================================================================================



###   
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1065199/description_fb8234ce-4aa7-492d-b0f5-04d9d519dbc7.gif)  



## This mod is just an export of the Hookshot and Longshot items from the [Zelda, Legend of the Master Sword](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zelda-legend-of-the-master-sword) mod.


**![ZLotMS-spoilers](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zelda_Legend_of_the_Master_Sword/BH_ZLotMS_spoilers.webp)**



**__How to get the Hookshot__**
<details>
Purchased from the Wandering Trader
</details>
 

**__Longshot Crafting Recipe__**
<details>
  
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1065199/description_e7192b19-4b87-40d5-a3bf-db02e366912f.png)
</details>
